_comment: Spike scenario: ramp from 5 workflows/sec to 200/sec across five stages. Total ~30k workflows, ~10 minutes on a healthy Postgres backend. Each step runs sequentially; maru's bench-workflow completes step N before starting step N+1, so this measures how fast the backend adapts to changing load, not sustained peak. For sustained-peak numbers, run a single-step scenario at the target rate.
